conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding technical jargon while maintaining a formal tone.
new_constraint: "Hey there! Just wanted to drop you a quick note about checking out your awesome product!"
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding technical jargon while maintaining a formal tone. "Hey there! Just wanted to drop you a quick note about checking out your awesome product!"
response:
Subject: Request for a Product Demonstration

Dear [Developer's Name or Team Name],

I hope this message finds you well.

I have been following your company's work with great interest and was particularly impressed by the capabilities of your latest product. After reviewing the available information, I believe your solution could offer significant value to our organization.

To better understand how your product aligns with our specific needs, I would like to request a brief demonstration at your earliest convenience. Please let me know if you have any availability in the coming weeks for a 30-minute session.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of learning more about your innovative work.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Job Title]  
[Your Company Name]  
[Your Contact Information]
